sidecar_notes: Staging deploy has stale deploy guard and owned lock cleanup behavior.
Ops theme asset may be skipped when not directly exposed, while workflow can still pass.

current_production_path.current_operator_path: local deploy-readiness skill plus exact SHA approval

production_automation_gap: Production can be manually dispatched, but is not yet chained from successful staging deploy on main.
Production approval should be represented by GitHub Environment protection instead of chat-only SHA approval.
Production workflow must keep CMS write, publish, sitemap/llms, search queue, and external search submission out of deploy.

current_staging_flow.deploy_mechanism: SSH to staging worktree, reset to GitHub SHA, run scripts/deploy_web_pm2.sh
smoke_checks: optional sitemap/CMS/content-release smoke controlled by env flags

current_production_path.current_operator_path: local deploy-readiness skill plus exact SHA approval

production_automation_gap: No fap-web production GitHub Actions workflow exists yet.
Production Node1 approval should use GitHub Environment protection.
Production workflow must fetch sitemap/llms only as read-only smoke, not regenerate or mutate them.

recommended_architecture.stage_1: Keep automatic staging deploy after main checks.
recommended_architecture.stage_2: After staging deploy success on main, start a production deploy workflow or production job waiting on GitHub Environment approval.
recommended_architecture.stage_3: After environment approval, run runtime deploy only and fail closed on smoke failure.
recommended_architecture.authorization_model: GitHub Environment production required reviewers replace chat-only exact SHA approval for ordinary runtime deploys.
excluded_from_runtime_deploy: database content mutations outside normal deploy/migration mechanics

github_environment_requirements.required_reviewers: configure in GitHub repository environment settings
github_environment_requirements.rollback_boundary: Rollback remains a separate explicitly approved action or a separate environment-gated workflow.
github_environment_requirements.incident_boundary: Unlock, process termination, queue restart outside existing deploy mechanics, and PM2 restart outside deploy remain separate incident approvals.

follow_up_prs.summary: Chain production backend deploy behind successful staging deploy and GitHub production environment approval.
Add production Node1 deploy workflow behind successful staging deploy and GitHub production environment approval.

warnings: GitHub Environment reviewer settings cannot be verified from repository files alone and must be configured in GitHub settings.
fap-api production target support exists in deploy.yml, but automatic chaining from staging success is not present yet.
fap-web needs a new production workflow because only staging deploy is currently automated.
